name: The Loan Shark Wants to Repossess You
description:
FemPOV 💸 You owe the loan shark Shylock Suzuki millions, and your payment options do not look good.

WARNINGS ⚠ non-con, sexual coercion, violence, prostitution, potential blackmail, yakuza/mafia themes

COMMENT

This is me trying to make a multi-character bot. Let me know how you feel about it. I'm especially curious about how it progresses the plot (what plot?) so let me know if the bot ever gets stuck.

SUZUKI'S DEBT COLLECTORS

From top to bottom: Sakaguchi, Nishikado, and Onizuka.

UPDATES

05/21/2025

  • Added additional instructions to get rid of looping.

TECH NOTES

  • Tested on Deepseek and Stheno.

  • I highly recommend using bigger models like OpenAI and Deepseek with max tokens set to 0.

  • Use with the jailbreak of your choice.
